transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Willowbrook Family Health. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Feldman. It's currently set for Thursday.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. What day works better for you?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Maybe next Monday? Also, I've been having chest pain and getting short of breath, so I wanted an earlier slot if possible.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, let me check availability for Monday. I have 9 a.m. or 2:15 p.m. open.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I've booked you for Monday at 2:15 p.m. with Dr. Feldman. You'll get a confirmation text shortly.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, thanks. Should I bring my medication list too?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, that's always helpful for the visit. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome. Have a good day, and we'll see you Monday.
